name: Taco Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup grated non-fat cheddar cheese or 4 packets
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ground beef until fully browned, then drain any excess fat.
2. Prepare the taco seasoning mix according to package instructions.
3. Tear the lettuce into bite-sized pieces and place it in a large bowl.
4. Add the cut tomatoes, drained kidney beans, grated cheese, and salad dressing (from the bottle of Kraft Fat-Free Catalina Salad Dressing) to the bowl with the lettuce.
5. Mix all ingredients well until combined.
6. Sprinkle the baked tortilla chips over the mixture.
7. Serve immediately and add hot sauce to taste.
